reviews.review_description:
I remember seeing a video of this game from a Hackathon, and I've been wanting to play it since! It's a lovely and unique game, that looks really nice with the mixed reality effect. 
I haven't completed all of the levels yet, but I think it could potentially have various things added to extend the playtime, such as scoring to add replay value, an optional harder mode with a timer/extra blobs appearing during the level/their colour changing, generated obstacles, maybe a little snooker/pool type mode to knock blobs into circles on a wall or into certain areas of the room.
